Proses editing juga terasa lebih cepat karena banyak template dan efek yang sudah tersedia. Ini tentu memudahkan, terutama bagi yang ingin hasil bagus tanpa harus memahami teknik editing yang terlalu dalam.

replyContent: If you didn’t use membership features but got a membership prompt when exporting, you may used them unconsciously. First, screenshot the "You are using the following premium features" page (lists used membership content). Then return to the editor, check each track to turn off those membership features/assets, and re-export.
